name: murakumo-nbb
description: npm deps for the nbb (ClojureScript-on-Node) overlay files (witness_dial.cljs / witness_dial_attest.cljs). The src/ Clojure control-plane has no npm deps of its own -- only these nbb siblings do. @noble/curves is required transitively via kotoba-lang/witness-quorum's attestation.cljs -> signer.cljs when witness_dial_attest.cljs is used; nbb resolves npm requires relative to the entry script/cwd, not the requiring source file's own directory, so a sibling checkout's node_modules isn't enough -- each nbb-runnable deployable unit needs its own.
